content: Confirmed: Korangi Industrial Road completely blocked. Water depth 4 feet at lowest point. Minimum 200 vehicles stranded. Rescue boats required urgently.
Confirmed: 9-vehicle pileup. 1 oil tanker overturned. Fuel spill 200m radius. 14 casualties, 3 critical. M-9 closed indefinitely. Alternative route via Super Highway activated. Fire brigade needed.

On-ground investigation complete. NO explosion. NO gas leak. What happened: A high-pressure KWSB water main burst loudly — created steam cloud and loud bang. Area is SAFE. All social media reports are FALSE.
SSGC confirms: All gas pipelines in Clifton Block 8-9 are INTACT. No gas leak or explosion detected. Source of panic: Burst KWSB pipeline under road. RETRACT all alerts.
